_source: Feishu bitable embedded in the '表格字段规则' doc (base Iot2bX1KAaChWwseWiCcuFwhn4L, table tblF4WjPdv92lxir): 品牌 -> 旗码厂商 (UPC 6-digit company prefix). A brand may have several prefixes; pick any. Brands NOT listed here get NO generated UPC (leave Product Id blank + highlight). Keep in sync with the Feishu table.
